summary: Skill Discipline Upgrades — Evidence Requirements, Red Flags, and Rationalizations to Reject for 8 high-traffic skills via shared discipline template

decisions.what: Evidence Requirements + Red Flags + Rationalizations to Reject
decisions.why: Evidence forces citation; Red Flags catch dangerous output; Rationalizations block reasoning traps
3 universal patterns ensure consistency; domain layer captures what's actually dangerous per area
Mix of frequency (most-run) and severity (highest-risk wrong output)

decisions.what: SKILL.md content only, no code changes
decisions.why: Maximum leverage per effort; discipline is prompt engineering

decisions.what: Red Flags must contain quoted agent phrase

decisions.why: Calibrate the pattern before applying to higher-risk domain skills
